feed.title: Current Watches, Warnings and Advisories for New Zealand issued by MetService
feed.rights: Copyright Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited, 2026. Licensed under Creative Commons BY 4.0.

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain are possible and accumulations may approach warning criteria. The timing and location of the heaviest falls is currently very uncertain. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain, with peak rain rates of 10 to 15 mm/hr this morning. Conditions slowly easing during the day. Rainfall accumulations may approach warning criteria, mainly about the ranges. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Low. Changes: Period extended a couple of hours, but chance of upgrade decreased to low.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited
